description_fr: Beatles, Stones, Queen, Led Zep, Hendrix. L'histoire du rock à travers ses légendes.
description_en: Beatles, Stones, Queen, Led Zep, Hendrix. Rock history through its legends.

questions.question_fr: De quelle ville sont originaires les Beatles ?
questions.question_en: Which city are the Beatles from?
questions.explanation_fr: John, Paul, George et Ringo sont tous nés à Liverpool.
questions.explanation_en: John, Paul, George and Ringo were all born in Liverpool.

questions.question_fr: Qui était le chanteur de Queen ?
questions.question_en: Who was the lead singer of Queen?
questions.explanation_fr: Freddie Mercury (1946-1991), né Farrokh Bulsara à Zanzibar.
questions.explanation_en: Freddie Mercury (1946-1991), born Farrokh Bulsara in Zanzibar.

questions.question_fr: Bohemian Rhapsody dure plus de 6 minutes.
questions.question_en: Bohemian Rhapsody is over 6 minutes long.
questions.explanation_fr: 5'55 exactement, mais radios diffusaient une version coupée à 3'30.
questions.explanation_en: Exactly 5:55, but radios played a cut version at 3:30.

questions.question_fr: Quelle chanson de Led Zeppelin parle d'un escalier vers le ciel ?
questions.question_en: Which Led Zeppelin song is about a stairway to heaven?
questions.explanation_fr: Stairway to Heaven (1971), souvent considérée comme la plus grande chanson de rock.
questions.explanation_en: Stairway to Heaven (1971), often considered the greatest rock song.

questions.explanation_fr: Jimi Hendrix est mort à 27 ans le 18 septembre 1970 par asphyxie après une overdose.
questions.explanation_en: Jimi Hendrix died at 27 on September 18, 1970, asphyxiated after an overdose.

questions.question_fr: Le club des artistes morts à 27 ans s'appelle le Club ___.
questions.question_en: The club of artists who died at 27 is called the ___ Club.
questions.explanation_fr: Hendrix, Joplin, Morrison, Cobain, Winehouse... tous morts à 27 ans.
questions.explanation_en: Hendrix, Joplin, Morrison, Cobain, Winehouse... all died at 27.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le surnom d'Elvis Presley ?
questions.explanation_fr: Elvis = 'The King of Rock and Roll'. Bruce Springsteen est 'The Boss'.
questions.explanation_en: Elvis = 'The King of Rock and Roll'. Bruce Springsteen is 'The Boss'.

questions.question_en: The Rolling Stones have existed since 1962.
questions.explanation_fr: Formés à Londres en 1962. Leader Mick Jagger toujours actif en 2025.
questions.explanation_en: Formed in London in 1962. Leader Mick Jagger still active in 2025.

questions.question_fr: Quel groupe de rock a sorti l'album 'The Dark Side of the Moon' ?
questions.question_en: Which rock band released 'The Dark Side of the Moon'?
questions.explanation_fr: Pink Floyd (1973), l'un des albums les plus vendus de tous les temps.
questions.explanation_en: Pink Floyd (1973), one of the best-selling albums of all time.

questions.question_fr: Qui était le batteur des Beatles ?
questions.explanation_fr: Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey) a remplacé Pete Best en 1962.
questions.explanation_en: Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey) replaced Pete Best in 1962.

questions.question_fr: Le célèbre groupe de Seattle des années 90, leader du grunge, s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: The famous 90s Seattle grunge band is called ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Nirvana avec Kurt Cobain a popularisé le grunge avec 'Smells Like Teen Spirit' (1991).
questions.explanation_en: Nirvana with Kurt Cobain popularized grunge with 'Smells Like Teen Spirit' (1991).

questions.explanation_fr: Formé à Sydney en 1973 par les frères Young (Malcolm et Angus).
questions.explanation_en: Formed in Sydney in 1973 by the Young brothers (Malcolm and Angus).

questions.question_fr: Quel chanteur des Doors a écrit la chanson 'Light My Fire' ?
questions.question_en: Which Doors singer wrote 'Light My Fire'?
questions.explanation_fr: Robby Krieger (guitariste) est le principal auteur de Light My Fire (1967).
questions.explanation_en: Robby Krieger (guitarist) is the main writer of Light My Fire (1967).

questions.question_fr: Quel groupe a sorti l'album 'Hotel California' ?
questions.question_en: Which band released the album 'Hotel California'?
questions.explanation_fr: The Eagles, sorti en 1976. L'album s'est vendu à plus de 32 millions d'exemplaires.
questions.explanation_en: The Eagles, released in 1976. The album sold over 32 million copies.

questions.question_fr: Le festival de Woodstock a eu lieu en ___.
questions.question_en: The Woodstock festival took place in ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Woodstock du 15 au 18 août 1969, dans l'État de New York.
questions.explanation_en: Woodstock from August 15-18, 1969, in New York State.
